reason: No active canonical frontier_research item existed; this additive update records the next completed non-duplicative research slice without overwriting shared queue state.

proposed_item.action: Translate current output-device routing specifications into a privacy-preserving browser evidence evaluator.

progress.finding: Resolved output selection and setSinkId establish browser-reported routing intent only; a durable evidence record should exclude raw device IDs and labels and must not be promoted to audibility proof.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-equivalent pre-commit files.

proposed_item.handoff: Vercel Studio may implement an optional gesture-bound output diagnostic with feature detection, default-output fallback, devicechange handling, and no retained device identifiers; physical-device audibility evidence remains mandatory.
